Title: The Power Broker
Author: Robert Caro
Notes: The definitive account of how Robert Moses shaped New York — and a masterclass in how infrastructure decisions are really political decisions.

Title: The High Cost of Free Parking
Author: Donald Shoup
Notes: Shoup's argument that minimum parking requirements distort cities more than most planners admit. Slow going but the core thesis is airtight.

Title: The Nature of the Firm
Author: Ronald Coase
Notes: Four pages that explain more about why organisations exist than most textbooks manage in four hundred. Still the clearest statement of transaction cost economics.
